pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated commons-lang 2.x with commons-lang3 to align with modern library standards.
Update MapStruct to a version compatible with Java 11 and modern annotation processing.
Upgrade Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, etc.) to versions that support Java 11 and modern build features.
Introduce JHipster dependency management BOM to centralize version control for the framework.
Change project packaging from WAR to JAR to utilize Spring Boot's embedded server capabilities.
Switch caching implementation from Ehcache 2.x to JCache (JSR-107) compliant providers.
Add Testcontainers for MySQL to enable modern, isolated integration testing.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for modern metrics collection compatible with Spring Boot 2.x.
Add Dropwizard Metrics core dependency required by Micrometer or other libraries.
Add ArchUnit dependencies for architectural unit testing with JUnit 5.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web for standardized error handling.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine to enforce JUnit 5 native execution without JUnit 4 compatibility layer.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for org.junit.vintage:junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove maven-processor-plugin as it is superseded by compiler plugin annotation processing.
Remove maven-sortpom-plugin as it is no longer required or maintained.
Remove gatling-maven-plugin, likely moving load testing to a different lifecycle or tool.
Add JIB plugin for containerizing the application without a Docker daemon.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to manage Node.js/NPM builds within Maven.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to generate git properties for the application.
Add properties-maven-plugin to read sonar-project.properties.
Update Liquibase reference URL to use Spring Boot naming strategies.
pom.xml.human_impl: Updated referenceUrl in liquibase-maven-plugin to include SpringPhysicalNamingStrategy.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-war-plugin to not fail on missing web.xml, supporting Spring Boot embedded containers.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to exclude integration tests from unit test phase.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added excludes for **/*IT* and **/*IntTest* in maven-surefire-plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-failsafe-plugin for integration tests (implied by surefire exclusions).
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to allow Java 8 to 15 range.
Remove executable bit from pom.xml as it is not a script.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin to manage integration tests.
Add sonar-maven-plugin for code quality analysis.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin for repackaging and build info.
Add profile to disable Liquibase database migrations.
Add profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add profile to enable TLS/SSL configuration.
Add profile to manage frontend build with Webpack.
Update dev profile to use Undertow, H2, and DevTools.
Update prod profile to use Undertow and Git commit ID plugin.
Add profile to build WAR archives.
Add profile to support IDE-specific code generation (MapStruct, Hibernate).
Add profile to configure Eclipse m2e lifecycle mapping.
Add profile for end-to-end testing configuration.
Remove deprecated yeoman-maven-plugin in favor of frontend-maven-plugin.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to manage Node.js and Webpack builds.
Update maven-clean-plugin configuration to clean new static resource directories.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganized .editorconfig to apply specific indentation rules to frontend and config file types instead of a global default.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent_style and indent_size into a specific glob pattern [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] with indent_size = 2, while keeping global settings for line endings and whitespace.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple wildcard rules with an extensive list of specific file extensions for text, binary, documents, and configs.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add generated main CSS file to gitignore to prevent committing build artifacts.
Ignore static resources in target classes to avoid committing compiled assets.
Ignore JavaScript test coverage reports generated during testing.
Ignore node temporary directory used by build tools.
Ignore npm debug log files generated during package installation.
Ignore Angular webpack cache directory to keep repo clean.
Ignore cache-loader directory used by webpack for faster builds.
Ignore Spring Tool Suite 4 cache directory.
Ignore IntelliJ IDEA compiled classes and output directories.
Ignore Visual Studio Code configuration directory.
Ensure Maven Wrapper jar is not ignored so it can be used for builds.
Ignore ESLint cache file to speed up linting.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update JHipster generator configuration to reflect a new application name, package structure, and version 7.0.0-beta.0 settings.
Change string-based boolean values ("no") to actual JSON booleans (false) for configuration properties.
Remove the deprecated Grunt frontend builder configuration in favor of the default or newer build tools.
Remove the explicit Java 8 version constraint from the generator config, allowing the default (Java 11+) to be used.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation including development, production, and testing instructions.

package.json.general_idea: Replace JSHint with ESLint and Prettier for modern JavaScript/TypeScript code quality enforcement.
package.json.human_impl: Removed jshint-stylish; added eslint, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, and prettier.

package.json.general_idea: Update frontend UI libraries to versions compatible with Angular 11, including Bootstrap 4 and FontAwesome.
Update end-to-end testing tools to Protractor 7 and Selenium WebDriver compatible with modern browsers.
package.json.human_impl: Added protractor 7.0.0 and webdriver-manager 12.1.7, replacing older e2e setups.

package.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator dependency to version 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Add comprehensive CI/CD scripts for backend testing, Docker management, and frontend building.
Update package name, version, and description to reflect the specific application identity.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the H2 database alias from 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' to reflect the in-memory nature of the database.
Change the H2 in-memory database name from 'jhipster' to 'jhipsterdtosampleapplication' to match the specific application context.
Set the H2 database user to 'jhipsterDtoSampleApplication' instead of leaving it empty.
Enable remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's default colored banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Standardize logging configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x level mapping and add JHipster-specific logging settings.
Configure Spring Boot DevTools for development profile, including restart exclusions and livereload settings.
Include the api-docs profile in the active profiles to enable Swagger/OpenAPI documentation generation.
Add standard Spring Boot mail properties and JHipster-specific mail base-url configuration.
Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing deprecated mode setting and keeping cache disabled for dev.
Explicitly disable H2 console in dev profile for security, replacing implicit behavior.
Add JHipster-specific logging configuration for JSON format and Logstash forwarding.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Removed explicit Hibernate dialect and database type configuration, relying on Spring Boot auto-configuration for MySQL.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect and database: MYSQL

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Removed explicit XHTML mode setting for Thymeleaf, defaulting to HTML5 mode which is standard in newer Spring Boot versions.
Added graceful shutdown configuration supported in Spring Boot 2.x.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Move mail configuration into the standard Spring Boot 'spring.mail' namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Moved 'mail' properties under 'spring.mail' and updated 'from' address.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Update Swagger documentation properties to align with newer JHipster/SpringFox conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced root 'swagger' block with 'jhipster.api-docs' and updated field names like 'termsOfServiceUrl' to 'terms-of-service-url'.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Configure Micrometer metrics export and health probes for Spring Boot 2.x actuator.
Add server servlet session cookie security settings.
